concept: Fashion a turn-based game where combat takes place on a three-dimensional chessboard with pieces that evolve based on their movement patterns over successive turns. Units that repeatedly use the same movement style become specialized experts in that pattern but lose flexibility, while varied movement creates adaptable but less powerful generalists. The battlefield contains special tiles that imprint additional movement memories when traversed, allowing strategic enhancement of evolutionary paths. Enemy forces evolve according to the same rules, creating an arms race of movement specialization and counter-specialization. The campaign culminates in a battle against perfectly evolved opponents whose movement patterns have reached their theoretical peak, requiring innovative strategies that exploit the inherent weaknesses of overspecialization.
